name: agent-labs
description: Companion executable code for the AI Agent Engineering course on AI Engineer Toolbox.

scripts.typecheck:node: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'),{execSync}=require('child_process'); const root=process.cwd(); const tsc=path.join(root,'node_modules','.bin','tsc'); const labs=path.join('labs'); for(const dir of fs.readdirSync(labs).sort()){const nodeDir=path.join(labs,dir,'node'); if(!fs.existsSync(nodeDir)) continue; console.log('Checking',dir); execSync(JSON.stringify(tsc)+' --noEmit --project tsconfig.json',{cwd:nodeDir,stdio:'inherit'});}"
scripts.compile:python: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'),{execSync}=require('child_process'); const labs=path.join('labs'); for(const dir of fs.readdirSync(labs).sort()){const py=path.join(labs,dir,'python','main.py'); if(!fs.existsSync(py)) continue; console.log('Compiling',py); execSync('python -m py_compile "'+py+'"',{stdio:'inherit'});}"
scripts.check: npm run typecheck:node && npm run compile:python
